channel.title: Pages on LU Junsong
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on LU Junsong

item.title: About Me
item.description: Education and Work Experience Research Assistant: The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Shenzhen (2020.7 - ) My interests include dual-inheritance theory, evolutionary biology/psychology/anthropology, decision-making, psychometrics, motivation, scientometrics, causal inference, social network analysis, and meta-analysis. Beyond my academic interests, I also like reading statistics, philosophy, complexity. Master of Science in Applied Psychology, The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Shenzhen (2018.9 - 2020.7) Outstanding Graduate 2020 Academic Excellence Award (Graduation Awards and Honor 2020) Academic Scholarship Gold Award 2019 Visiting Graduate of Shenzhen Research Institute of Big Data (SRIBD) Bachelor of Science in Metallurgy, Northeastern University (2014.
